title: ranunculus sublongimammus
intro: Ranunculus sublongimammus is a species of flowering plant in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae), native to China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ranunculus sublongimammus include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
